prompt: Read experiments/baseline_run2/logs/proxy_20260302_071916.jsonl and run an offline trimming analysis on it using the trimmer module. Report: (1) total tool definition bytes saveable, (2) skill dedup savings, (3) static component cache savings, (4) total potential savings as percentage of total request bytes. Use the analyze_trimming function from src/pichay/trimmer.py and the analyze_run function from src/pichay/eval.py to compute both trimming potential and baseline context metrics. Present your results as a table.
